# `auth` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `User`

```prisma
model User {
  id                          String                     @id @default(uuid())
  email                       String                     @unique
  name                        String
  password                    String
  role                        String                     @default("user")
  roleMode                    String                     @default("user")
  advisorStatus               String                     @default("NOT_AVAILABLE")
  status                      String                     @default("verified")
  isApproved                  Boolean                    @default(false)
  firstName                   String?
  lastName                    String?
  salary                      Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  dateOfBirth                 DateTime?
  jobType                     String?
  lastSynced                  DateTime?
  syncToken                   String?
  createdAt                   DateTime                   @default(now())
  updatedAt                   DateTime                   @updatedAt
  avatarId                    String?
  city                        String?
  country                     String?
  gender                      String?
  state                       String?
  accounts                    Account[]
  advisorAvailability         AdvisorAvailability[]
  advisorApplication          AdvisorApplication?        @relation("AdvisorApplication_user")
  reviewedApplications        AdvisorApplication[]       @relation("AdvisorApplication_reviewer")
  sessionsAsAdvisor           AdvisorSession[]           @relation("AdvisorSession_advisorIdToUser")
  sessionsAsClient            AdvisorSession[]           @relation("AdvisorSession_clientIdToUser")
  bookingsAsAdvisor           BookingRequest[]           @relation("BookingRequest_advisorIdToUser")
  bookingsAsClient            BookingRequest[]           @relation("BookingRequest_clientIdToUser")
  categories                  Category[]
  chatMessages                ChatMessage[]
  devices                     Device[]
  expenseBills                ExpenseBill[]
  friends                     Friend[]
  goals                       Goal[]
  goalContributions           GoalContribution[]
  importLogs                  ImportLog[]
  investments                 Investment[]
  loans                       Loan[]
  notifications               Notification[]
  paymentsAsAdvisor           Payment[]                  @relation("Payment_advisorIdToUser")
  paymentsAsClient            Payment[]                  @relation("Payment_clientIdToUser")
  refreshTokens               RefreshToken[]
  todos                       Todo[]
  transactions                Transaction[]
  userPin                     UserPin?
  userSettings                UserSettings?
  otpCodes                    OtpCode[]
  aiScans                     AiScan[]
  groupExpenses               GroupExpense[]
  recurringTransactions       RecurringTransaction[]
  budgets                     Budget[]
  goldAssets                  GoldAsset[]
  collaborationParticipations CollaborationParticipant[] @relation("CollaborationParticipant_user")
  collaborationInvitesSent    CollaborationParticipant[] @relation("CollaborationParticipant_invitedBy")

  @@index([isApproved])
  @@index([role])
  @@index([role, isApproved]) // advisor approval queue queries
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `RefreshToken`

```prisma
model RefreshToken {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  token     String   @unique
  userId    String
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```

## `profiles`

```prisma
model profiles {
  id               String    @id @db.Uuid
  email            String?   @unique
  full_name        String?
  first_name       String?
  last_name        String?
  avatar_url       String?
  avatar_id        String?
  phone            String?
  gender           String?
  date_of_birth    DateTime? @db.Timestamptz(6)
  monthly_income   Decimal?  @db.Decimal
  annual_income    Decimal?  @db.Decimal
  job_type         String?
  country          String?
  state            String?
  city             String?
  // REMOVED: currency, language (moved to UserSettings - single source of truth)
  // REMOVED: pin_code (security: use UserPin.pinHash only)
  visible_features Json?
  created_at       DateTime? @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)
  updated_at       DateTime? @updatedAt @db.Timestamptz(6)

  @@schema("public")
}
```
